# M1: Proposal

> On that night Ezra took me to a lavish vegan restaurant in London.
> He looked magnificent in his suit.
> I looked so beautiful in pink and black dress, my collar on full display, it made him stumble over his words.
> It wasn't till later in the evening did I realise my life would be happily bonded to his from then on.

- Scene
    - Ezra and Emily sit and eat their candlelit dinner
    - Ezra goes to the W.C. siking himself up as he sits on a toilet
    - Ezra returns to the table and proposes to Emily, she says yes
- Altered scene
    - Whilst sitting on the a tentacle breaks through and drags Ezra into the pipes
    - He screams as his bones shatter being forced into a hole too small for him
    - Emily hears his screams and sees his body being pulled down
